_meta.description: Regression test suite manifest for parallel orchestration with module-aligned directories under Frontend/Backend layers
_meta.csvFormat: Enriched Agent-Native CSV (ID, Title, Section, Priority, Business_Rule, Edge_Case_Refs, Preconditions, Test_Data, Steps, Assertions, Cross_Layer_Checks, Failure_Signals, Cleanup, References, Automation_Status)

suites.name: Payment CyberSource
suites.browserRequirementReason: CyberSource Microform v2 uses cross-origin iframes (testflex.cybersource.com) that Firefox MCP cannot access via accessibility tree. Chromium CDP required.

suites.name: Payment Cross-Cutting
suites.browserRequirementReason: Includes PCI compliance checks against CyberSource Microform iframe; Firefox MCP cannot access cross-origin iframe DOM.
